_note: I52 P5 (D-IH-52-D / D-IH-52-E): per-endpoint per-GPU-hour pricing for serverless GPU endpoints (RunPod, Kalavai, ...). Deliberately separated from config/eval/model-prices.json so that token-based and gpu_hour-based costs never co-mingle in a single computation path. Operator-edited; FinOps owns. When an endpoint_id is missing from this table, cost = 0.0 (warn at scrape time per R-45-11 + R-52-3).
_unit_contract: All entries are USD per GPU-hour (continuous wall-clock time). For endpoints that bill per-second internally, the operator records duration_hours = seconds / 3600 in the CostRecord; the rate stays per-hour for human-readable dashboards.
_2026_q2_review_note: I52 P5 introduction (2026-05-03). Initial entries are placeholder-only; no live RunPod or Kalavai run has been executed against AKOS as of this review. Live pricing must be confirmed against the operator's contracted RunPod / Kalavai dashboard before the first AKOS_RECORD_LIVE=1 endpoint run. POL-EVAL-COST-CEILING-ENDPOINT-{RUNPOD,KALAVAI}-V1 in POLICY_REGISTER pin the per-endpoint hourly ceilings; this file pins the per-endpoint observed rates.

runpod:a100-80gb.notes: Placeholder per RunPod 2026-Q2 published serverless pricing; confirm against operator account before live run.

runpod:h100-80gb.notes: Placeholder per RunPod 2026-Q2 published serverless pricing; confirm against operator account before live run.

kalavai:default.notes: Kalavai 2026-Q2 reference rate for federated mixed-tier inference; community-pool pricing varies, refresh quarterly.
